testcase.name: should create nexus.properties file
should create nexus.properties file in release namespace when namespaces.nexusNs.name is empty
should create nexus config map
should create nexus config map in release namespace when namespaces.nexusNs.name is empty
should create db secret only when secret.dbSecret.enabled is true
should create db secret in release namespace when secret.dbSecret.enabled is true, and aws.secretmanager.enabled and azure.keyvault.enabled are false, and nexusNs.name is empty
should not create db secret when aws.secretmanager.enabled is true
should not create db secret when azure.keyvault.enabled is true
should not create db secret when externalsecrets.enabled is true

testsuite.name: test external secrets operator admin secret

testcase.classname: test external secrets operator admin secret
testcase.name: should create admin secret when externalsecrets.enabled is true and aws.secretmanager.enabled and azure.keyvault.enabled are false

testsuite.name: test external secrets operator database secret

testcase.classname: test external secrets operator database secret
testcase.name: should create database secret when externalsecrets.enabled is true and aws.secretmanager.enabled and azure.keyvault.enabled are false

testsuite.name: test external secrets operator license secret

testcase.classname: test external secrets operator license secret
testcase.name: should create license secret when externalsecrets.enabled is true and aws.secretmanager.enabled and azure.keyvault.enabled are false

testsuite.name: test external secrets operator nexus secret

testcase.classname: test external secrets operator nexus secret
testcase.name: should create nexus secret when externalsecrets.enabled and externalsecrets.secrets.nexusSecret.enabled are true

testsuite.name: test external secrets operator secret store

testcase.classname: test external secrets operator secret store
testcase.name: should create secret store when externalsecrets.enabled is true and aws.secretmanager.enabled and azure.keyvault.enabled are false
should create external dns objects

testsuite.name: test fluent bit yaml for aws

testcase.classname: test fluent bit yaml for aws
testcase.name: should create fluent bit objects
should create image pull secret
should create image pull secret in release namespace when namespaces.nexusNs.name is empty
should create nexus ingress with no rules
should create nexus ingress with default HTTP rule
should create nexus ingress with default HTTP rule which has no host
nexus ingress should have a HTTP rule which has the host set
nexus ingress should have additional http rules
nexus ingress should have a default and docker subdomain routing rules
should specify tls hosts
should create docker ingress with a HTTP rule which has its host set
should create nexus ingress in release namespace when namespaces.nexusNs.name is empty
should create docker ingress in release namespace when namespaces.nexusNs.name is empty
should create license secret when license.licenseSecret.enabled is true
should create license secret in release namespace when namespaces.nexusNs.name is empty
should be empty doc when azure.keyvault.enabled is true
should be empty doc when aws.secretmanager.enabled is true
should be empty doc when externalsecrets.enabled is true
should not create any namespaces
should create nexusrepo namespace
should create cloudwatch namespace
should create cloudwatch namespace and nexus namespaces
should create external dns namespace
should create release based namespace if nexusNs.name is empty
should create admin secret when secret.nexusAdminSecret.enabled is true and aws.secretmanager.enabled and azure.keyvault.enabled are false
should create admin secret in release namespace when secret.nexusAdminSecret.enabled is true, and aws.secretmanager.enabled and azure.keyvault.enabled are false, and nexusNs.name is empty
should create nexus secret
should create license secret in release namespace when namespaces.nexusNs.name is empty
should create secret provider class when aws secret manager enabled
should create secret provider class for azure keyvault when azure keyvault enabled
should create secret provider in release namespace when namespaces.nexusNs.name is empty
should create headless service
should create headless service with additional headless annotations
should create headless service without additional headless annotation
should create headless service with common annotation overwrite
should create headless service with publishNotReadyAddresses set to false
should create service account
should create service account in release namespace when namespaces.nexusNs.name is empty
should create nexus service
should create docker service
should create nexus service in release namespace when namespaces.nexusNs.name is empty
should create docker service in release namespace when namespaces.nexusNs.name is empty
should set replicas to 1 when clustered is false
should set specified replicas when clustered is true
should set zdu env to true and rollingUpgrades when zeroDowntimeEnabled is true
should mount license secret when secret.license.enabled
should mount nexus secret when secret.nexusSecret.enabled
should mount db secret when secret.db.enabled is enabled
should mount secret store volume when aws secret manager enabled
should mount secret store volume when azure keyvault enabled
should not mount secret store volume when aws secret manager and azure keyvault are not enabled
should set service account name when aws enabled
should create pod spec
should create init container
should specify node selectors
should specify host aliases
should create image pull secret when enabled
should use volumeClaimTemplate when enabled
should use existing claim when volumeClaimTemplate not enabled and existing claim specified
should use emptyDir when volumeClaimTemplate when not enabled and no existing claim specified
should set additional environment variable when specified
should not set additional environment variable when not specified
should set nexus datastore enabled to true when clustered is false
should create nxrm-app container with dynamic nexusdata volume
should mount config volume when enabled
should mount properties volume when override enabled
should mount additional volume mounts when specified
should include additional containers when specified
should create in release namespace when namespaces.nexusNs.name is empty
should create request-log container
should create audit-log container
should create tasks-log container
should create storage class
